label: About
title: About Nocturne Current Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 59 recent saved-signal files and 75 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Céleste Boursier-Mougenot and Clinamen Bourse de Commerce Paris, plus 7 more. A source image from offloadmedia.feverup.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Nocturne Current Field: Create one finished still image as a textile field seen through an overhead scan: a wide, uninterrupted water-like surface with sparse off-center drift paths, not a centered basin. Use the visual reference only for curved rim geometry, pale architectural edge behavior, blue water, white flecks, and skylit hush. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against bottom-right stone crescent rim, central cyan current pool, and top-center wake seam.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
